description.content: Uploads an object to the specified bucket. The request body contains the object content. Supports standard HTTP headers for content type and metadata.

variable.description: (Required) Name/key of the object to upload.

description.content: Retrieves the content of the specified object from the bucket.

description.content: Retrieves metadata for the specified object without returning the body.
Removes the specified object from the bucket.
Deletes multiple objects from the bucket in a single request.
Restores an archived object for temporary access.
Renames an object within the bucket.
Sets the access control list for the specified object.
Retrieves the access control list for the specified object.
Removes the access control list for the specified object.
Initiates a multipart upload session and returns an upload ID.
Uploads a single part in a multipart upload session.
Completes the multipart upload by assembling all parts.
Aborts and cleans up an in-progress multipart upload.
Pre-caches the specified object in the CDN edge nodes.
Refreshes the CDN cache for the specified object.

Xiaomi Galaxy File Data Storage (FDS) is a cloud object storage service providing a RESTful API for managing files and objects. It supports bucket management, object CRUD operations, access control lists, multipart uploads, and CDN prefetch/refresh operations across multiple regional data centers.
